alternative_parents.description: Benzenesulfonic acids (or derivative thereof) carrying a bromine at the para- position.
alternative_parents.name: p-Bromobenzenesulfonates

alternative_parents.description: Arenesulfonate esters that result from the formal condensation of the hydroxy group of an alcohol, enol, phenol or heteroarenol with benzenesulfonic acid.
alternative_parents.name: Benzenesulfonate esters

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an aryl group attached to the sulfonic acid group (or a derivative thereof).
alternative_parents.name: Arylsulfonic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing a benzenesulfonyl group, which consists of a monocyclic benzene moiety that carries a sulfonyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Benzenesulfonyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a nitrobenzene moiety, which consists of a benzene ring with a carbon bearing a nitro group.
alternative_parents.name: Nitrobenzenes

alternative_parents.description: C-nitro compounds where the nitro group is C-substituted with an aromatic group.
alternative_parents.name: Nitroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an oxazolidinone moiety, which is an oxazolidine bearing a ketone group.
alternative_parents.name: Oxazolidinones

alternative_parents.description: Esters of sulfonic acid, which have the general structure RS(=O)2OR' (R,R' = organyl, not H).
alternative_parents.name: Organosulfonic acid esters

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing the sulfonyl group, with the general structure RS(=O)2R' ( R,R' must not be H).
alternative_parents.name: Sulfonyls

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an ester of carbamic acid with the general structure R2NC(=O)OR' (R' not H). They are esters of carbamic acids.
alternative_parents.name: Carbamate esters

alternative_parents.description: Organic 1,3-dipolar compounds with the general structure  X#N+-Z- <-> X-=N+=Z <-> X-=N-Z+ <-> X-N=Z (X = C or O, Z = C, N, or O).
alternative_parents.name: Propargyl-type 1,3-dipolar organic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one oxygen atom linked to a ring carbon.
alternative_parents.name: Oxacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds comprising the oxoazanium cation, with the formula N+=O.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxoazanium compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organonitrogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carbonyl group, with the general structure RC(=O)R', where R=organyl, R'=H, N, O, organyl group or halide group.
alternative_parents.name: Carbonyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds consisting of an assembly of cations and anions.
alternative_parents.name: Organic salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds with a positive electric charge.
alternative_parents.name: Organic cations

class.description: Aromatic compounds containing one monocyclic ring system consisting of benzene.
class.name: Benzene and substituted derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as p-nitrobenzenesulfonates. These are benzenesulfonic acids (or derivative thereof) carrying a nitro group at the para- position.

direct_parent.description: Benzenesulfonic acids (or derivative thereof) carrying a nitro group at the para- position.
direct_parent.name: p-Nitrobenzenesulfonates

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing a sulfonic acid or a derivative thereof that is linked to a benzene ring.
subclass.name: Benzenesulfonic acids and derivatives

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
